top_signals.title: China-US spat over South China Sea threatens to overshadow ASEAN meeting
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Burnham backs away from costly increase to income tax allowance
top_signals.summary: New prime minister had explored raising £12,570 personal allowance before taking office on Monday
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Minutes of the Money Market Committee meeting – June 2026
top_signals.summary: The Money Markets Committee is a forum for market participants and authorities to discuss the UK unsecured deposits and funding market and securities lending and repo markets.

top_signals.title: Oaktree’s Poli Sees a $200 Billion ‘Distressed Moment’ Coming as Rates Stay High
top_signals.summary: Companies with $200 billion in debt face a reckoning as funding costs stay high and debt comes due over the next few years, according to distressed specialist Oaktree Capital Management.

top_signals.title: The Yahoo Boys — the true stories of four Nigerian online love scammers
top_signals.summary: A quest to expose fraudsters in Lagos led Carlos Barragán to a criminal racket fuelled by poverty — and by western loneliness

top_signals.title: Turkish opposition leader to create breakaway party to take on Erdoğan
top_signals.summary: Move by Özgür Özel could threaten longtime Turkish leader at next election scheduled for 2028

top_signals.title: How will UK foreign policy change under Ed Miliband?
top_signals.summary: Former energy secretary vows to reinvigorate climate diplomacy, stand up for rule of law and ‘nurture’ relationship with US

top_signals.title: Commission sends Statements of Objections to several companies and trade associations in suspected construction chemicals cartel
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 20 Jul 2026 The European Commission has informed several manufacturers of construction chemicals active in France, Germany and Spain as well as three national trade associations, of its preliminary view that they have breached EU antitrust rules by colluding to increase prices in the supply of chemicals for cement, concrete and mortar.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: MEXC adds Bittensor TAO staking for its global user base
top_signals.summary: The integration with validator Yuma gives millions of MEXC users access to Bittensor, an AI-focused blockchain whose ecosystem now spans 128 specialized subnets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
